name: pm-prioritization-tool
description: Product Management Prioritization Tool (RICE, MoSCoW, financial frameworks) with browser cache and optional MongoDB on Vercel.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('index.html')) throw new Error('missing index.html'); if(!fs.existsSync('api/state.js')) throw new Error('missing api/state.js'); console.log('OK: static root + api/ ready for Vercel');"
scripts.test: npm run test:storage && npm run test:metadata
